statement: Lambda on-demand single-GPU rental was $4.29/hr for H100 SXM as observed live on 2026-07-11.
why: A live rental rate with no stated baseline or change is a static price level used only as a display overlay.

impact.mechanism: Cloud GPU rental price level for H100 on a neocloud provider; context for merchant-GPU cost of compute.

confidence.basis: Secondary live pricing page, single source; price is an overlay that does not score.

dispersion: conflicting same-key reports: value 6.99 -> 4.29 (tol 1%); sources: Lambda GPU cloud pricing
